anti_templating_check: Six pages read as a set with distinct framing per pick. A13 (limited-companies-and-btl-properties) = OPERATIONAL HANDBOOK for running a BTL LtdCo through lifecycle, with three load-bearing sub-pillars (FRS 105/102 fair-value decision; CA 2006 s.859A 21-day MR01 charge plumbing; lifecycle/exit decision tree). A14 (llp-accounts) = LLP ACCOUNTS-AND-FILING OPERATIONAL HANDBOOK anchored to three-layer GAAP architecture (LLPA 2000 + SI 2008/1911 + CCAB LLP SORP 2025), distinct from any company-accounts material. A15 (llp-and-taxation-benefits) = HONEST UK-PROPERTY-CONTEXT TAX ANALYSIS surfacing eroded claims (Section 24 escape, corporate-member workaround, BPR) alongside genuine benefits (Sch 15 SLP, CGT AEA, bounded allocation, non-tax limited liability). A16 (partnership-partnership-agreement-roles-types-benefits) = CROSS-CUTTING AGREEMENT-AND-ROLES PRACTICAL HANDBOOK across general partnership/LP/LLP, anchored to PA 1890 s.24 nine defaults + s.26 + s.33(1) + s.14 as load-bearing operational discipline. A17 (register-for-uk-corporation-tax) = CT-REGISTRATION OPERATIONAL ENTRY-POINT HANDBOOK, load-bearing on FA 2004 s.55 3-month-clock-starts-at-chargeable-date subtlety + dormancy notification + iXBRL + ECCTA-vs-HMRC verification distinction + multi-SPV. A18 (sole-trader-vs-partnership) = EARLY-ENTITY-CHOICE COMPARISON, honest framing of headline-tax-identity vs operational differences + Form 17 alternative for couples + step-up triggers. Worked examples use distinct personas across the six pages (Singh / Patel / Mawell-Estate / Kapoor / Verma / Singh-business-associate cycled across picks with role-variation to avoid template feel; no two picks reuse identical persona-role-portfolio combinations). FAQ phrasing varies per pick. Each pick has its own distinctive content angle that no other batch page restates.
honest_framing_discipline_check: Three of the six pages (A13, A15, A18) carry honest framing as primary discipline. A13 surfaces multi-SPV marginal-relief reality (associated companies dilute thresholds; structure does NOT escape rate), MVL anti-phoenix TAAR ITTOIA 2005 s.396B (NOT ITA 2007), BADR unavailable for BTL investment LtdCo, ATED NIL-return obligation. A15 systematically surfaces eroded LLP claims (Section 24 not escaped at individual member level; corporate-member workaround dismantled; salaried-member rules apply to all LLP types regardless of property/investment status; BPR for landlord-investment LLP generally false per Pawson) alongside genuine remaining benefits (Sch 15 SLP relief on incorporation; CGT AEA; bounded profit-allocation; non-tax limited liability). A18 surfaces joint-and-several-liability reality of general partnership, SA800 per-partner penalty multiplication, CGT part-disposal on partner introduction, settlements legislation challenge on family allocations, Form 17 as operationally-lighter alternative for couples. All three pages avoid advocacy mode; each presents the decision frame honestly with what holds + what fails.

discoveries_logged: D-17 RUN-PHASE HONEST-FRAMING DISCIPLINE HELD CLEANLY ACROSS SIX-PAGE BATCH — A13 + A15 + A18 each carry honest decision-frame as primary discipline (multi-SPV marginal-relief reality / LLP Section 24 reality / sole-trader-vs-partnership reality). The three honest-framing pages share a consistent voice across the batch: surface eroded / over-claimed benefits FIRST, then surface genuine remaining benefits SECOND, then provide decision frame THIRD. The 'when this IS the right choice / when this is the WRONG choice' framing repeats consistently across A15 + A18 + A13 exit-decision-tree without templating because the underlying substantive content is distinct per pick. Pattern: honest-framing voice is reproducible across multiple picks in a batch when each pick has substantively-distinct subject matter; risk-of-templating low at multi-honest-page batch size. Recommendation: this pattern is reusable for future MW2 batches where multiple honest-framing pages are in scope (e.g., M2-B-B5+ if any HMRC-anti-avoidance picks come through honest decision-frame territory).

D-18 SIX-PAGE INTERNAL CROSS-LINK DENSITY — final cross-link grid: A13 references 17 internal pages (5 within MW2 Bucket A + 12 existing); A14 references 14 internal pages (8 within MW2 + 6 existing); A15 references 17 internal pages (9 within MW2 + 8 existing); A16 references 14 internal pages (8 within MW2 + 6 existing); A17 references 14 internal pages (8 within MW2 + 6 existing); A18 references 17 internal pages (10 within MW2 + 7 existing). Recommendation: this distributed-cross-link pattern is the right design for a non-pillar batch and should be the default for any MW2 specialist-page batch.
